items.back: ATC clearance is required before entering an active stationary airspace reservation.

items.front: 8-6-2: Pilot refuses avoidance clearance — controller action
items.back: Advise the pilot of the hazard and request the pilot's intentions. The pilot assumes responsibility for consequences of the refusal.
Moving reservations travel with an activity along a path and require separation along the moving path. Stationary reservations are tied to a fixed geographic area.
